headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive Rating on Global Payments (GPN)
summary: Recent analyst ratings make Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) one of the 10 best payment processing stocks to buy now. On June 11, Bryan Bergin from TD Cowen decreased the price target from $86 to $74 on Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN), resulting in a revised upside potential of almost 19%. The analyst reiterated his Hold rating […]
